# A Marketing Maturity Guide: 3 Levels of Personalization - Iterable

## A Marketing Maturity Guide: 3 Levels of Personalization

When building a first-class customer experience, every little detail counts. Leaders like Spotify, Amazon and Netflix have ushered in a new era of convenience and personalization we didn’t know was possible.

Now it’s on all brands to live up to these high standards. Though challenging, there’s hope—83% of consumers will share their data in return for more personalized experiences.

This guide explains how to personalize email and cross-channel campaigns that deliver hyper-relevant content at the perfect moment for each customer.

**Download this guide to:**

*   Master the three distinct levels of personalization maturity
*   Create dynamic content with user and event data, data feeds and metadata
*   Learn how top brands are building individualized recommendations
